suite.name: Suite Suite One 1

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

test.name: TC_001 — Successful Login With Valid Credentials

kw.name: When Enter Valid Credentials
kw.msg: No keyword with name 'When Enter Valid Credentials' found. Did you mean: keywords.When User Enters Valid Credentials
kw.status: No keyword with name 'When Enter Valid Credentials' found. Did you mean: keywords.When User Enters Valid Credentials

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.doc: Access the login page, enter valid username and password, click login. Expected: User is redirected to the secure area and success message is displayed.
test.status: No keyword with name 'When Enter Valid Credentials' found. Did you mean: keywords.When User Enters Valid Credentials

test.name: TC_002 — Failed Login With Incorrect Password

kw.name: When Enter Credentials With Wrong Password
kw.msg: No keyword with name 'When Enter Credentials With Wrong Password' found.
kw.status: No keyword with name 'When Enter Credentials With Wrong Password' found.

kw.name: Then Verify Failed Login With Wrong Password
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.doc: Access the login page, enter valid username and wrong password, click login. Expected: User stays on login page and error message 'Your password is invalid!' is displayed in red.
test.status: No keyword with name 'When Enter Credentials With Wrong Password' found.

test.name: TC_003 — Failed Login With Incorrect Username

kw.name: When Enter Credentials With Wrong Username
kw.msg: No keyword with name 'When Enter Credentials With Wrong Username' found.
kw.status: No keyword with name 'When Enter Credentials With Wrong Username' found.

kw.name: Then Verify Failed Login With Wrong Username
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.doc: Access the login page, enter invalid username and wrong password, click login. Expected: User stays on login page and error message 'Your username is invalid!' is displayed in red.
test.status: No keyword with name 'When Enter Credentials With Wrong Username' found.

suite.doc: Test Cases for login scenarios on the Internet Herokuapp
